title: ASelected 30Pcs White Paper Bags with Handles, 15x8x21CM White Gift Bags Small Kraft Paper Party Bags for Birthday, Weddings, Shopping, Graduation, Christmas
features: PAPER BAGS WITH HANDLES:30pcs white paper bags,size 15 x 8 x 21cm,ideal for packing small gifts,sweets,retail goods,etc
DIY:Pure white paper bags,as the Gift Bags are not printed,the thick paper bags can be coloured,stamped,painted,printed,so you can leave your paintings on the paper bags

MATERIAL:White paper bags are made of high quality kraft paper, thick and tear-resistant, not easy to break, reusable. Enhance the handling of the handle rope paper bag carrying handle with twisted paper design, hold firmly, easy to carry
WIDELY USED:Small white paper bags are perfect to use as gift bags, candy bags, wedding gift bags, retail bags etc. Can be used for birthdays, Easter, anniversaries, etc

STRONG PRACTICALITY: the bottom crease of the paper bag is flat, many times brushing glue reinforcement, so that the bottom is not easy to break, strong carrying capacity, the items will not easily fall out of the paper bag
